prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021年物理类录取位次（当年未公布分专业位次），2025年最低录取位次约126名，为近年唯一可参考基准。北京大学在江苏物理类招生位次极靠前，稳定在全省前150名以内；2021年物理类计划22人，2025年计划23人，2026年计划28人，较2025年扩招5人（增幅约21.7%），扩招有利于缓解竞争压力，但绝对增量有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年位居第2名（Top2），属全国顶尖学府，对考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园安全、录取断档等舆情事件；抖音综合热度排名第3（高热），短视频平台曝光量极大，反映报考关注度持续高涨。历史投档异常记录中未见北京大学在江苏的断档信号；北京大学拥有A-及以上学科40个，其中A+学科30余个，涵盖哲学、经济学、法学、文学、理学、工学、医学等门类，学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、临床医学等热门专业持续高热推荐；法学、金融/财经/经济呈分化观望态势；新闻传播学明显劝退。2026年江苏省普通高考总人数约52.1万人，较2025年（约35.8万人）大幅增长约45.6%，其中物理类估算约38万人，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧。；北京大学位于北京，非本省高校，在江苏无本地招生倾斜；跨省报考热度受学校顶尖层次支撑，地域因素影响较小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次126名、2026年物理类扩招5人（+21.7%）、全省考生大幅增加约45.6%以及学校持续高热度的报考关注，扩招对位次有后移作用（位次数字增大），但考生大幅增加加剧竞争，两者部分抵消。预测2026年物理类最低录取位次约147名，区间97–197名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班类（元培）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、智能科学与技术）
- 数学类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（电子信息科学与技术、微电子科学与工程）
- 理科试验班类（数学类）（光华）
- 生物科学类（生物科学、生物技术）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 化学类（化学、应用化学、化学生物学）
- 理科试验班类（数学类）（法学院）
- 工科试验班类（理论与应用力学、工程力学等）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间97-197名内，建议以二档专业为主、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如97名以内）可重点冲击元培、计算机等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（197名附近）建议优先考虑二档专业并确保三档保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the admission ranking for Physics Category (specific major rankings not published that year) was recorded. The minimum admission ranking in 2025 is approximately 126, serving as the only reliable benchmark in recent years. Peking University's admission rankings in Jiangsu's Physics Category are extremely high, consistently within the top 150 in the province. The enrollment plan for Physics Category was 22 in 2021, 23 in 2025, and 28 in 2026, an increase of 5 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 21.7%). This expansion helps alleviate competition pressure, but the absolute increase is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 2nd (Top 2) in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for many years, making it a top-tier national institution with strong appeal to candidates. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety and admission gaps. Its comprehensive popularity on Douyin ranks 3rd (high heat), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting sustained high attention from applicants. Historical admission anomaly records show no signs of gaps for Peking University in Jiangsu. Peking University has 40 A- or above disciplines, including over 30 A+ disciplines, covering philosophy, economics, law, literature, science, engineering, medicine, and other fields. Its academic strength is top-tier nationally, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Clinical Medicine continue to be highly recommended. Law, Finance/Economics show a divided and wait-and-see trend. Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Jiangsu Province is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.6% compared to 2025 (about 358,000). Among them, the Physics Category is estimated to have about 380,000 candidates, with a significantly expanded candidate pool and intensified competition. Peking University is located in Beijing, not a local university in Jiangsu, so there is no local admission preference. Cross-provincial application enthusiasm is supported by the university's top-tier level, with regional factors having a relatively small impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 126, the 2026 Physics Category expansion of 5 students (+21.7%), a significant increase of about 45.6% in provincial candidates, and the sustained high application enthusiasm for the university, the expansion tends to push the ranking backward (ranking number increases), but the large increase in candidates intensifies competition, partially offsetting each other. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 147, with a range of 97 to 197.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Science Experimental Class (Yuanpei)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Mathematics Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Science and Technology, Microelectronics Science and Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics) (Guanghua)
- Biological Sciences (Biological Science, Biotechnology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Chemistry (Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, Chemical Biology)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics) (Law School)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Theoretical and Applied Mechanics, Engineering Mechanics, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 97-197, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 97), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors like Yuanpei and Computer Science. If your ranking is near the upper limit (around 197), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 2 majors and ensure Tier 3 as a safety.
